\documentclass{siddur}

% Custom page numbering to yield 17.a, 17.b, etc.
\renewcommand{\thepage}{17.\alph{page}}

% --- MACRO DEFINITIONS ---
\newcommand{\blockA}{%
  A VERY OLD SONG aroused me into life \\
when it drove away my low spirits. \\
with its royal language. \\
A song of a generation silenced \\
from the days of old \\
aroused me into life.%
}

\newcommand{\blockB}{%
  STANDING on the parted shores of history, \\
we still believe what we were taught \\
before ever we stood at Sinai: \\
that wherever we are, it is eternally Egypt \\
that there is a better place, a Promised Land; \\
that the winding way to that promise passes \\
through the wilderness \\
that there is no way to get from here to there \\
except by joining hands, marching \\
together.%
}

% --- DOCUMENT BODY ---
\begin{document}
\blockA
\vspace{1em}
% \newpage % Uncomment to break page here
